hero.description: Discover the features that make multiple CucumberHTML reporter the preferred reporter for engineering teams. Build trust through visibility.

accordion.title: Unmatched Capabilities
accordion.description: Deep dive into the specialized features that set us apart from standard reporters.

items.title: Rich Metadata and Environment Info
pointers: Capture OS, Browser, and Device information automatically
Custom metadata fields for CI/CD pipeline details
Environment-specific tags and labels
Automated platform detection

items.title: Interactive Analytics Dashboards
pointers: Detailed pass/fail distribution charts
Test performance trend analysis
Detailed charts for features, scenarios and scenario steps
OS, Browser, and Device-specific charts
Top tags and slow steps featured charts

items.title: Advanced Diagnostics
pointers: Clean, formatted stack traces with syntax highlighting
Attached screenshots and video capture on failure
Attached logs for better debugging
Step-by-step execution logs

items.title: Rich and Detailed Feature and Scenario Tables
pointers: Detailed table for feature and scenario
Easy to understand stats for each features and scenarios
User friendly filtering of records
Quick navigation between features and scenarios

items.title: Customize report to your Brand
pointers: Customize the report title and sub title
Customize the report logo (Coming soon!)
Customize the report footer

cta.title: Ready to upgrade your reports?
